app.title: Grant
app.description: A modern authorization platform for individuals and organizations.

welcome.title: Welcome to Grant
welcome.description: A modern authorization platform for individuals and organizations. Manage user access, permissions and roles for your applications with simplicity.

username.label: Username
username.description: This will be your unique identifier. If left empty, it will be generated from your name.

popover.title: Username
popover.description: This will be your unique identifier. If left empty, it will be generated from your name.

autoGeneration.title: Auto-Generation
autoGeneration.description: Your username is automatically generated from your name. You can edit it anytime, but once you do, it won't auto-update when you change your name.

personal.title: Personal Account
personal.description: Perfect for individual users who want to manage their own projects and access control. Ideal for developers, freelancers, and personal projects.

organization.title: Organization Account
organization.description: Designed for teams and companies. Includes advanced features like team management, role-based access control, and centralized administration for multiple users and projects.

login.title: Sign In
login.description: Sign in to manage access for your projects
login.emailError: Please enter a valid email address
login.passwordError: Password must be at least 6 characters
login.verifyEmailDescription: Please verify your email to access all features

register.title: Create Account
register.description: Create your account to start managing access for your projects
register.verifyEmailDescription: Please check your email and verify your account to access all features

forgotPassword.title: Reset Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a secure link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.emailSentDescription: Check your email for a link to reset your password.

resetPassword.title: Create New Password
resetPassword.description: Enter your new password below. Make sure it's strong and secure.

success.title: Password Reset Successfully
success.description: Your password has been reset. You can now log in with your new password.

error.title: Password Reset Failed
error.description: We couldn't reset your password. Please try again.

invalidToken.title: Invalid Reset Link
invalidToken.description: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.

verifyEmail.title: Email Verification
verifyEmail.verifyingDescription: Please wait while we verify your email address
verifyEmail.successMessage: Your email has been verified successfully
verifyEmail.successDescription: Your email has been verified. You can now access all features.
verifyEmail.errorDescription: We couldn't verify your email. The link may have expired or is invalid.
verifyEmail.expiredTokenDescription: Your verification link has expired. Please log in again to receive a new verification email.
verifyEmail.missingTokenDescription: This verification link is invalid or missing required information.

resendVerification.title: Resend Verification Email
resendVerification.description: Enter your email to receive a new verification link
resendVerification.successMessage: Verification email has been sent successfully
resendVerification.successDescription: Check your inbox for the verification link

notifications.verificationWarning: Please verify your email to access all features. Your verification link will expire in {days} days.
notifications.verificationExpired: Your email verification has expired. Please request a new verification email.

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address
validation.password: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.name: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.username: Username must be at least 3 characters
validation.usernameUnique: This username is already taken. Please choose a different one.

callback.errorDescription: An error occurred during GitHub authentication. Please try again.

noUsers.title: No users found
noUsers.description: Get started by creating your first user

noSearchResults.title: No users found
noSearchResults.description: Try adjusting your search terms or create a new user

validation.rolesRequired: User must have at least one role

deleteDialog.title: Delete User

notifications.tagAddedError: Failed to add tag to user
notifications.tagRemovedError: Failed to remove tag from user

roles.emptyDescription: This user has no roles assigned in this project

removeDialog.title: Remove Role
removeDialog.description: Are you sure you want to remove the role "{name}" from this user?

tags.title: Tags
tags.emptyDescription: This user has no tags assigned in this project

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.emptyDescription: Get started by creating your first API key

createDialog.title: Create New API Key
createDialog.description: Create a new API key for this user

revokeDialog.title: Revoke API Key
revokeDialog.description: Are you sure you want to revoke the API key "{name}"? This action cannot be undone and the key will no longer be usable.

deleteDialog.title: Delete API Key
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete the API key "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

secretDialog.title: API Key Created
secretDialog.description: Save your API key credentials. This is the only time you'll be able to view the client secret.
secretDialog.warning: This is the last time you'll be able to view the client secret. Make sure to copy it now and store it securely.

groups.title: Groups
groups.emptyDescription: This user has no groups assigned through their roles

descriptions.owner: Full control over the organization and all its resources
descriptions.admin: Administrative access to manage organization settings and members
descriptions.dev: Developer access to manage projects and resources

empty.title: No members yet
empty.description: Invite members to join your organization

inviteDialog.title: Invite Member
inviteDialog.description: Send an invitation to join this organization

removeMemberDialog.title: Remove Member
removeMemberDialog.description: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from this organization? This action cannot be undone.

revokeInvitationDialog.title: Revoke Invitation
revokeInvitationDialog.description: Are you sure you want to revoke the invitation for {email}? This action cannot be undone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure your account preferences and options

account.title: Account Information
account.description: View, switch between workspaces, and/or create complementary workspace

information.title: Account Details
information.description: Update your account name and username

name.label: Account Name
name.description: This is your account's display name. It can be your personal name or your organization name.

username.label: Username
username.description: Your unique identifier across the platform. Must be at least 3 characters and can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.

type.title: Account Type
type.description: Your account type determines the features available to you

complementary.title: Create a Complementary Workspace
complementary.description: You can also create a {type} workspace to access additional features.
complementary.dialogDescription: Are you sure you want to create a {type} workspace? This workspace will be separate from your current workspace.

immutable.title: Note:
immutable.description: Account type cannot be changed after creation for security and billing purposes.

notifications.createComplementaryAccountSuccessDescrip: Your new {type} account has been created. You can switch between accounts using the account switcher.

selection.title: Select Account
selection.description: Choose which account you want to manage

name.label: Display Name
name.description: This is your full name displayed across the platform.

avatar.title: Profile Picture
avatar.description: Upload a profile picture to personalize your account
avatar.comingSoon: Profile picture support is coming soon! You'll be able to upload a custom avatar to personalize your account.

upload.title: Upload Profile Picture
upload.description: Select an image, crop it to your liking, and upload it as your profile picture

dropzone.idle: Drag and drop an image here, or click to browse
dropzone.hint: Supported formats: JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP (max 5MB)

errors.invalidType: Invalid file type. Please use JPG, PNG, GIF, or WebP.
errors.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is {maxSize}MB.
errors.readFailed: Failed to read the file. Please try again.
errors.uploadFailed: Failed to upload the image. Please try again.

security.title: Login & Security
security.description: Manage your authentication methods and security settings

authenticationMethods.title: Authentication Methods
authenticationMethods.description: Manage how you sign in to your account
authenticationMethods.cannotDisconnectLastMethod: Cannot disconnect your last authentication method. Please add another method first.
authenticationMethods.emailConnectError: Failed to add email authentication method
authenticationMethods.setPrimaryError: Failed to set primary authentication method

addEmailAuthMethod.title: Add Email Authentication Method
addEmailAuthMethod.description: Add an email address and password to sign in to your account

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.description: Update your password to keep your account secure

activeSessions.title: Active Sessions
activeSessions.description: Manage your active login sessions across all devices
activeSessions.revokeConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to revoke this session? The user will need to log in again on that device.
activeSessions.revokeCurrentSessionDescription: Are you sure you want to revoke your current session? You will be logged out immediately and redirected to the login page. You will need to log in again to continue.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.description: Configure your user interface and application preferences

theme.label: Theme
theme.description: Choose your preferred theme or match your system settings

language.title: Language & Region
language.label: Language
language.selectDescription: Choose your preferred language for the interface

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.comingSoonDescription: You'll be able to customize email notifications, in-app alerts, and notification frequency.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: Manage your privacy settings and data

dataExport.title: Data Export
dataExport.description: Download a copy of your account data
dataExport.info: You can request a copy of all your personal data stored in your account. This includes your account information, profile data, sessions, and activity history.

dataRetention.title: Data Retention
dataRetention.description: Learn about how we handle your data

active.title: Active Accounts
active.description: Data for active accounts is retained indefinitely while your account is in use. You can request data deletion at any time.

deleted.title: Deleted Accounts
deleted.description: When you delete your account, your data is marked for deletion and will be permanently removed after 30 days. During this period, you can restore your account.

backup.title: Backup & Recovery
backup.description: We maintain encrypted backups of your data for disaster recovery purposes. These backups are retained for up to 90 days after account deletion.

accountDeletion.title: Account Deletion
accountDeletion.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data
accountDeletion.warning: This action cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently deleted.

consequences.title: What happens when you delete your account:
consequences.data: All your account data, projects, and settings will be permanently deleted
consequences.access: You will lose access to all organizations and projects you're a member of
consequences.irreversible: This action is irreversible and cannot be undone

dialog.title: Delete Account
dialog.description: Are you absolutely sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone and all your data will be permanently removed.
dialog.warning: Please confirm your user ID to proceed with account deletion.
dialog.userIdHint: Copy your user ID using the button above.
dialog.confirmUserIdHint: Enter your user ID above to confirm account deletion. This prevents accidental deletions.

accountDeletion.userIdMismatch: The entered user ID does not match your user ID. Please try again.

invitations.title: Organization Invitation
invitations.description: You've been invited to join an organization
invitations.loadingDescription: Please wait while we verify your invitation

invalidToken.title: Invalid Invitation
invalidToken.description: This invitation link is invalid or has been revoked. Please contact the person who invited you for a new invitation.

expired.title: Invitation Expired
expired.description: This invitation has expired. Please contact the person who invited you for a new invitation.

alreadyAccepted.title: Invitation Already Accepted
alreadyAccepted.description: You have already accepted this invitation and are a member of this organization.

requiresLogin.title: Login Required
requiresLogin.description: Please log in or register with an organization account using the same email address as the invitation to accept this invitation.

requiresOrgAccount.title: Organization Account Required
requiresOrgAccount.description: You need to be logged in with an organization account to accept this invitation. Please switch to your organization account or log in with one.

ready.title: Accept Invitation
ready.description: You've been invited to join this organization. Review the details below and accept to become a member.

success.title: Invitation Accepted
success.description: You have successfully joined the organization!

error.title: Error Accepting Invitation
error.description: An error occurred while accepting the invitation. Please try again.
